title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: CHURCHILL HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1850 Bailey Hill Road Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Students living in the 4J school district Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm (541) 790-5100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 790-5227 Main phone Main phone (541) 790-5100 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance plans. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHURCHILL HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
